falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 5200 on any day in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 equivalent swing low (~5200) would invalidate the bottom_2024_aug pattern match, as the original bottom held that level; this would signal continuation lower not a bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 on any day in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The August 2024 bottom saw VIX peak near 28; a spike above 35 would indicate panic escalation beyond the referenced pattern, breaking the structural similarity and suggesting a more severe liquidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >20bps from current level in next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion would signal deteriorating growth expectations/credit stress inconsistent with a durable bottom formation; the August 2024 bottom coincided with curve steepening/stabilization

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
